data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures all data exchanges are encrypted to prevent eavesdropping and data breaches.
data.technical_spec: Protocols: TLS 1.2, 1.3; Certificates: Managed by Let's Encrypt.

data.title: Firewall Implementation
data.description: Protects against unauthorized access and potential threats from the internet.
data.technical_spec: Systems: AWS WAF, Cloudflare; Rules: IP whitelisting, strict ACLs.

data.title: Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
data.description: Real-time monitoring to identify and respond to potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Tools: Snort, Suricata; Configurations: Anomaly detection, Signature-based detection.

data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security by requiring multiple forms of identifying factors.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent audits to detect vulnerabilities and ensure compliance with security standards.
data.technical_spec: Frameworks: OWASP, NIST; Tools: Nessus, Qualys.
